description: Semrush is a search and online visibility platform for SEO, traffic analysis, advertising research, local SEO, content, and related marketing workflows. It provides access to Semrush datasets and tools for keyword, traffic, backlink, and local ranking analysis.
summary: Semrush exposes three documented HTTP API families—Standard API, Trends API, and Map Rank Tracker API—and a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.semrush.com/openai/v1/mcp`; Standard API uses an API key, while Trends, Map Rank Tracker, and MCP use OAuth 2.0.
